testcase.name: test_schedule_from_forecast_null_branch_rejected

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 error when branch is null, got 422 assert 422 == 400 + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_cpc_final_cleanup.py:133: in test_schedule_from_forecast_null_branch_rejected assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 error when branch is null, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 error when branch is null, got 422 E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_schedule_from_forecast_with_valid_branch

failure.message: AssertionError: Created schedule should have branch assigned assert None == 'Unit 1 Vedica' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff5183aa0b40>('branch') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff5183aa0b40> = {'message': 'Production schedule created from forecast', 'remaining_forecast_qty': 1990, 'schedule': {'allocated_quantity': 0, 'branch': 'Unit 1 Vedica', 'completed_quantity': 0, 'created_at': '2026-03-15T14:20:15.678354+00:00', ...}}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_cpc_final_cleanup.py:326: in test_schedule_from_forecast_with_valid_branch assert data.get("branch") == branch, "Created schedule should have branch assigned" E AssertionError: Created schedule should have branch assigned E assert None == 'Unit 1 Vedica' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff5183aa0b40>('branch') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff5183aa0b40> = {'message': 'Production schedule created from forecast', 'remaining_forecast_qty': 1990, 'schedule': {'allocated_quantity': 0, 'branch': 'Unit 1 Vedica', 'completed_quantity': 0, 'created_at': '2026-03-15T14:20:15.678354+00:00', ...}}.get
